job_description:
Software Implementation & Support Engineer

The Software Implementation & Support Engineer plays a key customer-facing role responsible for ensuring the successful deployment, enhancement, and ongoing support of software solutions. This position serves as a bridge between clients, project managers, and engineering teams, translating business needs into actionable technical tasks while delivering a seamless and high-quality customer experience.

Responsibilities:

  • Collaborate with development and engineering teams to implement software solutions tailored to client requirements.
  • Work with cross-functional teams to gather requirements, clarify expectations, create development tasks, and address software-related concerns.
  • Build and maintain strong customer relationships by acting as a reliable, responsive, and solution-focused point of contact.
  • Provide end-to-end software support, including testing, diagnosing, and resolving functional and technical issues.
  • Perform log analysis and support real-time application issue identification.
  • Document issues and resolutions thoroughly, ensuring transparent communication with customers.
  • Execute SQL queries and assist with database configuration and maintenance.
  • Facilitate customer meetings, manage follow-ups, and maintain visibility into progress.
  • Support clients with software setup, configuration, and deployment.
  • Conduct user training sessions and prepare documentation for onboarding.
  • Monitor system performance and identify opportunities to improve customer experience.
  • Ensure compliance with security and data-protection standards.
  • Provide regular updates to stakeholders on issues, enhancements, and project progress.

Experience:

  • Project Management, software development, testing, or support.
  • Collaboration with technical or product teams.
  • Understanding of web application development (IIS, .NET, SQL, APIs, etc.).
  • Strong communication, documentation, and organizational skills.
  • Ability to guide small teams or coordinate tasks.

Technical Knowledge:

  • Windows Server, IIS, SQL Server
  • AWS, Azure, cloud services
  • ASP.NET, C#, jQuery, JavaScript
  • REACT, MongoDB, Express.JS, Node JS

Location:

Infopark Kochi, Muvattupuzha, or Hybrid (limited)

Application Instructions:

Email your resume with the subject line 'Software Implementation & Support Engineer' and include the following in the body: 1. Years/months of relevant experience. 2. Current location. 3. Notice period required to join. 4. Current remuneration and expectations.

Contact: thr@empressinfotech.com
summary: The Software Implementation & Support Engineer bridges clients and technical teams to deploy and support software solutions, ensuring seamless customer experiences through proactive communication and technical expertise.

job_description:
Business Analyst

The Business Analyst plays a key role in ensuring requirements are clearly understood, accurately documented, and traceable throughout the software development lifecycle. This role focuses on translating business and functional inputs into structured, standardized documentation that supports effective development, testing, and delivery. Working closely with business analysts, design teams, and technical stakeholders, the role ensures consistency, clarity, and alignment across all requirement artifacts.

Key Responsibilities

  • Create Software Requirement Specifications (SRS) based on inputs from Core Business Analysts, stakeholder discussions, and requirement walkthroughs
  • Prepare Business Requirement Documents (BRD) using approved templates while ensuring business intent and system behavior are clearly documented
  • Participate in requirement discussions to understand business objectives, functional flows, dependencies, and assumptions before documentation
  • Analyze requirements to identify gaps, ambiguities, and inconsistencies, and work with Core BAs to resolve them
  • Document functional flows, business rules, and acceptance criteria where applicable to support development and QA teams
  • Document wireframes, UI flows, validations, and UI specifications in collaboration with design and product teams
  • Maintain change logs, version history, and document updates throughout the project lifecycle
  • Create and manage traceability matrices linking business, functional, and technical requirements
  • Maintain cross-references across BRD, SRS, UI, API, and related documentation
  • Ensure documentation consistency, completeness, and alignment with approved scope and delivery timelines
  • Ensure accurate and timely PMS updates with structured documentation details
  • Support development, QA, UAT, and audit processes through clear, traceable, and up-to-date documentation
  • Assist in requirement reviews, walkthroughs, and validation sessions with internal and client stakeholders

Required Skills and Experience

  • 1 to 4 years of experience in Business Analysis documentation or related roles
  • Strong experience in BRD and SRS creation
  • Hands-on experience with documentation templates, standards, and version control
  • Ability to document UI wireframes and functional flows clearly
  • Working knowledge of APIs and system integrations for documentation purposes
  • Experience with project management systems and documentation tools
  • Strong attention to detail and ability to manage multiple documents in parallel
  • Excellent written communication and stakeholder coordination skills

Minimum Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Information Systems, or a related field
  • 1 to 4 years of experience as a Business Analyst or Product Analyst

Benefits

  • A growth-driven environment with opportunities to lead, innovate, and upskill continuously.

If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at careers@2basetechnologies.com.
summary: The Business Analyst translates business needs into structured documentation, ensuring clarity and alignment across development and testing. Responsibilities include creating BRDs/SRS, analyzing requirements, and maintaining traceability for project success.

job_description:
Senior Business Analyst

At 2Base, we are rebuilding the Business Analyst function into a world-class, product-minded, clarity-driven team. This role is not a documentation role. It is not a screen updater role. It is not a support role. This is a core Business Analyst position responsible for functional modeling, system reasoning, requirement clarity, and building the foundation for correct development.

Key Responsibilities

  • Lead requirement workshops, client calls, and discovery discussions to understand business needs clearly.
  • Ask deeper questions, challenge assumptions, and validate the true business intent behind every requirement.
  • Convert ambiguous client inputs into structured, logical, and actionable functional understanding.
  • Break large features into modules, workflows, components, and clear dependencies.
  • Build strong system-level understanding involving APIs, integrations, data flow, and backend considerations.
  • Translate business processes into functional logic that development teams can execute.
  • Decompose requirements into use-case flows, system behaviours, edge cases, alternate paths, validation rules, and dependencies.
  • Prepare high-quality documentation, including BRD, FRD, SRS, workflows, state diagrams, data-flow diagrams, API requirement specs, and acceptance criteria.
  • Ensure all documentation is clear, logical, structured, testable, and ready for developers and QA to use.
  • Collaborate closely with developers, architects, QA, and product owners to validate feasibility and align understanding.
  • Ensure QA teams can derive test cases effectively from your functional logic and acceptance criteria.
  • Communicate confidently with clients, handle requirement discussions smoothly, and clarify misunderstandings immediately.
  • Push back politely on unclear or changing requirements and ensure final decisions are documented properly.
  • Maintain requirement traceability throughout the lifecycle and ensure zero ambiguity during handover to development.
  • Own the entire requirement lifecycle from discovery to development readiness with high accountability.
  • Drive clarity across teams by ensuring every requirement is complete, validated, and logically consistent.

Required Skills & Experience

  • Minimum 4+ years of core Business Analyst experience with strong analytical and system-level thinking.
  • Ability to break down complex requirements into clear components, workflows, and functional logic.
  • Excellent verbal and written communication with confidence in client interactions and clarifications.
  • Proven experience in preparing SRS, BRD, FRD, workflows, and acceptance criteria with high clarity.
  • Ability to challenge assumptions politely, ask the right questions, and ensure zero ambiguity.
  • Strong collaboration experience with development, QA, architects, and cross-functional teams.
  • Understanding of API behaviours, integrations, data flows, and multi-module system interactions.
  • Ability to run requirement discussions, workshops, and independently lead discovery sessions.
  • Exposure to SaaS, scalable products, automation, or AI-supported systems is an added advantage.
  • Demonstrated ownership of requirements end-to-end, ensuring developer-ready and testable outputs.
  • Not suitable for UI-only thinkers, passive communicators, template-based writers, or those relying on AI for answers.
  • Success is defined by clear, testable requirements, zero rework, strong cross-team alignment, and confident communication.
  • Candidates must align with 2Base’s structured thinking, clarity-driven culture, and transformation of the BA function.

Minimum Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Business, or related field
  • 4 to 8 years of experience as a Business Analyst or Product Analyst
  • Experience in SaaS or scalable product environments
  • Exposure to AI/Automation, integrations, or multi-module systems
  • Ability to run independent client workshops
  • Must have independently handled requirement ownership for at least one full project lifecycle

Benefits

  • A growth-driven environment with opportunities to lead, innovate, and upskill continuously.

If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at careers@2basetechnologies.com.
summary: Senior Business Analyst at 2Base drives functional modeling and system clarity, ensuring precise requirements for development. Requires 4+ years of core BA experience with SaaS, API, and AI/Automation expertise.

job_description:

This is a foundational Quality Analyst role responsible for understanding requirements deeply, validating system behaviour logically, and ensuring development outputs are correct, testable, and aligned with business intent.

  • Convert requirements into structured and logical test scenarios.
  • Assist in writing detailed, structured, and traceable test cases.
  • Perform manual testing for web and mobile applications.
  • Execute system testing, integration testing, regression testing, browser compatibility testing, and responsive testing to ensure the application functions correctly across different environments and devices.
  • Identify edge cases, alternate flows, and boundary conditions.
  • Log, document, and track defects with clarity and reproducibility.
  • Validate fixes and ensure no regression impact.
  • Support the creation and maintenance of test reports.
  • Collaborate closely with Business Analysts and Developers to clarify expected behaviours.
  • Participate in Agile/Scrum meetings and sprint-level validation.
  • Gradually learn automation basics and structured testing approaches, AI testing tools.

Requirements:

  • Basic understanding of software testing concepts and QA processes.
  • Strong attention to detail and structured thinking ability.
  • Willingness to deeply understand business logic before testing.
  • Ability to think beyond happy paths and identify edge cases and risks.
  • Good written and verbal communication skills.
  • Analytical thinking and curiosity to question unexpected system behaviour.
  • Ability to work with minimal supervision in a fast-paced environment.
  • Strong documentation skills for defect reporting and test case writing.
  • Interest in learning automation, AI testing methodologies and structured QA.
  • Positive attitude and ownership mindset.

Experience & Education:

  • Recent graduates or students from the 2025 /2026 batch pursuing or holding a Diploma, Degree, or B.Tech in IT, CS, or MCA.

About Lean Transition Solutions (LTS)

LTS is a global Operational Excellence and Lean Industry 4.0 software company headquartered in the UK. For over a decade, we’ve helped large organizations turn strategy into action by combining Lean thinking, leadership principles, and modern, scalable technology. We operate as a connected global team across India, Europe, the US, the Middle East, and Mexico.

Location

Technopark Phase 1, Trivandrum

Role Overview

We seek a motivated iOS Developer with 3+ years of experience to join our dynamic team. You will design, build, and maintain robust iOS applications while collaborating with senior developers and cross-functional teams to deliver innovative, user-friendly solutions.

Key Responsibilities

  • App Development: Design, develop, and maintain iOS applications; collaborate with senior developers to build scalable solutions.
  • Code Quality: Write clean, efficient code adhering to iOS best practices; conduct unit/UI tests.
  • Feature Implementation: Work with UX/UI designers to implement new features.
  • Troubleshooting & Debugging: Resolve performance issues, bugs, and crashes.
  • Collaboration: Define project requirements, roadmaps, and timelines in cross-functional meetings.
  • Continuous Improvement: Participate in code reviews and stay updated on iOS trends.
  • App Performance: Optimize apps for speed and scalability using monitoring tools.

Required Experience

  • 3+ years of hands-on iOS development experience with production-ready apps.

Preferred Skills

  • Programming Languages & iOS Frameworks: Proficiency in Swift; knowledge of Objective-C is a plus.
  • UI/UX Design: Auto Layout, Storyboards, SwiftUI, responsive UIs.
  • API Integration: RESTful API integration and networking tasks.
  • Development Tools: Xcode, Git version control.
  • Debugging & Performance: Memory management, performance optimization.
  • OOP Principles: Strong knowledge of Object-Oriented Programming and design patterns.
  • Testing: Unit/UI tests, multi-device testing.
  • Firebase Integration: Firestore, Realtime Database, Authentication, Cloud Messaging, Crashlytics, Remote Config.
  • Multi-Device Testing: Optimize apps for various iPhone/iPad models and iOS versions.
  • Learning Mindset: Stay updated on iOS trends.
  • Communication: Collaborative team environment.

Why Work With Us

  • Meaningful Work: Contribute to platforms used by global leaders like Philips, Hitachi, and Pfizer.
  • People-First Culture: Ideas are valued; supported by a team built on trust and respect.
  • Purpose-Driven Technology: Solve real operational and leadership challenges.
  • Growth & Ownership: Continuous learning, career development, and ownership of work.
  • Global Exposure: Collaborate with diverse teams and clients worldwide.
  • Quality & Trust: ISO-certified platforms ensuring high standards and reliability.

Build a Strong Future Together

At LTS, we deliver long-term relationships and sustainable growth. We offer competitive benefits, a supportive environment, and a culture valuing balance, trust, and success.

Application Instructions

Interested candidates should email their detailed resume to careers@ltslean.com with the subject "Application for iOS Developer". Include the following in the email: - Current CTC - Expected CTC - Notice Period - Current Location - Total Relevant Experience - Willingness to work at the office
